# 11 USC 362 Automatic Stay - Bankruptcy Protection Guide [2026]
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> 11 USC 362 automatic stay stops all creditor actions the moment you file bankruptcy. Learn what it covers, exceptions, violations, and re...

## About
automaticstay.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Automatic Stay Limited to 30 Days for Repeat Filers - Section 362(c)(2) and (c)(3): https://automaticstay.org/362c-repeat-filer.html
- Bankruptcy Protection - How Bankruptcy Protects You [2026] - Automatic Stay: https://automaticstay.org/bankruptcy-protection.html
- My Car Was Repossessed After I Filed Bankruptcy - What Do I Do? - Automatic Stay: https://automaticstay.org/car-repossessed.html
- Motion to Extend the Automatic Stay (Comfort Order): https://automaticstay.org/comfort-order.html
- Creditor Still Calling After I Filed Bankruptcy - What Do I Do? - Automatic Stay: https://automaticstay.org/creditor-still-calling.html
- Emergency Bankruptcy Protection - What the Automatic Stay Stops Immediately: https://automaticstay.org/emergency-protection.html
- Exceptions to the Automatic Stay - What Bankruptcy Does NOT Stop: https://automaticstay.org/exceptions.html
- Automatic Stay FAQ - Bankruptcy Protection Questions Answered: https://automaticstay.org/frequently-asked-questions.html
- How Long Does the Automatic Stay Last? - Chapter 7 vs. Chapter 13: https://automaticstay.org/how-long-does-it-last.html
- 11 USC 362 Automatic Stay - Bankruptcy Protection Guide: https://automaticstay.org/
- Motion for Relief from Stay - When Creditors Ask the Court to Lift the Stay - Automatic Stay: https://automaticstay.org/motion-for-relief.html
- Your Car Was Repossessed During Bankruptcy: What to Do Now [2026 Guide] - Automatic Stay: https://automaticstay.org/repossession.html
- Automatic Stay Limits for Repeat Filers - 362(c)(3) and 362(c)(4): https://automaticstay.org/serial-filer-limits.html
- Serial Filer Stay Limitation - Repeat Filing Restrictions - Automatic Stay: https://automaticstay.org/serial-filer-stay-limitation.html
- When Creditors Violate the Automatic Stay - Your Rights Under Section 362(k): https://automaticstay.org/violations.html
- What the Automatic Stay Covers - Lawsuits, Garnishments, Foreclosures, Repossessions: https://automaticstay.org/what-it-covers.html
- Privacy Policy: https://automaticstay.org/privacy.html
